calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-10-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Floyd Butler. Petitioner Robert Michael Selleck was sworn and examined. The Court grants the Decree changing name to Robert Michael Cascella. Decree signed in open court.
